query:
INSERT INTO employee_documents (
  employeeId,
  fileName,
  originalFileName,
  fileSize,
  mimeType,
  s3Key,
  s3Url,
  category,
  status,
  expirationDate,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
) VALUES (
  1,
  'patch_clearance.pdf',
  'PATCH Clearance - Jane Doe.pdf',
  204800,
  'application/pdf',
  'test/patch_clearance.pdf',
  'https://example.com/test/patch_clearance.pdf',
  'clearance_patch',
  'approved',
  DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 DAY),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
